name: devtool_graphic
creator: neiluj
description:
helps devs to create a graphic interfance using fill_rects

  • [Var] to create a square [Ok] to place it
  • Move with arrow keys
  • Extend lenght or with by pressing arrow keys + [toolbox]
  • [Ans] : choose new rgb color : key backspace to erase the old one, use number keys . EXE at the end
  • EXE when you are done then OK and copy outputs
